title: carlina grandiflora
intro: Carlina grandiflora, also known as the Carline Thistle or False Thistle, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Carlina grandiflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carlina grandiflora, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are often used to make teas, capsules, and creams for various health applications.
